channel.title: Posts on dyrone
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on dyrone

item.title: How to debug git?
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: When I am starting to learn about development skills of git, first thing flash in my thoughts is to debug it, because debug is usually is the best way to understand how a huge program works. begin with git-init builtin cmd git contains many builtin cmd ,look at in your project root dir: In another word, git is organized by git buildin cmds, When you run a git cmd such as git push or git init etc, git main routine will try to resolve it to the corresponding builtin cmd, For example,git cmd with args init => git init is coresponding to git-init builtint cmd.

item.title: DEVELOPER parameter in make
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: GNU Make GNU Make is a tool which controls the generation of executables and other non-source files of a program from the program’s source files. Make gets its knowledge of how to build your program from a file called the makefile, which lists each of the non-source files and how to compute it from other files. When you write a program, you should write a makefile for it, so that it is possible to use Make to build and install the program.

item.title: Sliding Window Algorithm
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: There is a pic of sliding window arrived first, i will write the blog back soon!

item.title: syslog in Clang
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: syslog protocol syslog is a protocol that use for recording logging informations at Unix. The protocol not only could use for logging system infos, but also could logging the devices transportation, like network switches, routers etc. But the most use scence of syslog is the basic OS logging fuctions, this is what we will talk about in the next. formation syslog is consist of 7 parts: Facility Level Action Time Hostname or IP Address PID Logging Message Facility, Level and Action will define the location of the logging messages and the logging types and levels.

item.title: The attribute characteristics in Clang
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: THe attribute mechanism preview One of the best (but little known) features of GNU C is the __attribute__ mechanism, which allows a developer to attach characteristics to function declarations to allow the compiler to perform more error checking. It was designed in a way to be compatible with non-GNU implementations, and we’ve been using this for years in highly portable code with very good results. contents from: http://www.unixwiz.net/techtips/gnu-c-attributes.html

item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: 匹配特定目录下的特定分支 git svn init file:///disk1/svnroot/ali_china/olps/trading -T trunk -b branches/2019* trading git svn fetch git svn clone –ignore-refs的正常否定查找不好用 or sh svn_convert_to_git.sh -k 'CONVERT' -n 'ali_china/olps/trading' -c 'http://daily-code.aone.alibaba.net/api/v3/migrate/callback' -i '1' -g 'git@gitlab.alibaba-inc.com:1688trade/trading.git' -f true -s true -t 'trunk' -b 'branches/2019*' #refs: http://www.worldhello.net/gotgit/04-git-model/070-git-svn.html https://git-scm.com/book/zh/v1/Git-%E4%B8%8E%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F-%E8%BF%81%E7%A7%BB%E5%88%B0-Git
